title: A Night at the Ritz
writer: Albert J. Cohen, Robert T. Shannon, Manuel Seff
actors: William Gargan, Patricia Ellis, Allen Jenkins
plot: Duke Regan is the high-pressure, irresponsible promotions/marketing/press agent at the Ritz Hotel. He gets the taste of the home cooking, done by the mother of Marcia Jaynos, but thinks it was done by her brother, Leopold. Leopold...
